creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
If I run shutter from the command line (Konsole, csh):

- its (minimal) icon appears in the system tray
- its main window does not appear
- Control-C in the terminal window seems to have no effect. 

----

grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % pkg query '%o %v %R' perl5 shutter xfce
lang/perl5.28 5.28.1 FreeBSD
deskutils/shutter 0.93.1_5 FreeBSD
x11-wm/xfce4 4.12_1 FreeBSD
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % date ; uname -v
Tue  1 Jan 2019 20:02:21 GMT
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r342466 GENERIC-NODEBUG 
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ %
